Wet and Dry Use: Sand paper pack for walls can be dry or wet sanded to provide you with efficient and smooth sanding results; the sponge material makes the sanding pads have water storage function, which can improve work efficiency

Easy to Use: The size of sand paper pack for wood is 12x10x1.3cm/4.72 x 3.94 x 0.5 inch, which is easy to hold and comfortable to hold. It is suitable for sanding and polishing complex surfaces, including curves, joints, or hard-to-reach areas

Wide Application: Suitable for sanding putty, drywall repair, woodworking, scrubbing pots and pans, furniture polishing, metal rust removal, primer polishing, suitable for polishing and cleaning metal, plastic, stone, drywall and other materials
